messages.content: Starting BE-8: Conversation BC identity reference cleanup. Will inspect `internal/conversation/identity` and remove/migrate it. Progress updates to follow.
messages.searchText: starting be-8 conversation bc identity reference cleanup will inspect internal conversation identity and remove migrate it progress updates to follow
messages.senderDescription: 全栈开发实现，包括单测

messages.content:
BE-8 done. All tests pass.

Changes:
- Deleted `internal/conversation/identity/` package (broken after migration 0033 replaced its DB schema)
- Removed `IdentityRegistrar` port + `WithIdentityRegistrar` from `workforce/service.AgentInstanceManagementService` (old ADR-0033 cross-aggregate invariant; in v2.6 identity_id is set explicitly on AgentInstance AR)
- Removed CLI `identity add/list` commands + admin API `/admin/identity/find` and `/admin/identity/register` endpoints
- Removed all callers: `cli/app.go`, `admin/api/deps.go`, `admin/api/errors.go`, `webconsole/api/handlers.go`, integration tests, server tests
- Preserved `conversation.IdentityRef` value type in `types.go` (used for message sender_identity_id, no DB dependency)
- `IdentityBCFacade` wiring into MessageWriter deferred to post-FE-1 when auth context carries BC9 identity IDs

Moving to BE-9.
messages.searchText: be-8 done all tests pass changes deleted internal conversation identity package broken after migration 0033 replaced its db schema removed identityregistrar port withidentityregistrar from workforce service agentinstancemanagementservice old adr-0033 cross aggregate invariant in v2.6 identity id is set explicitly on agentinstance ar removed cli identity add list commands admin api admin identity find and admin identity register endpoints removed all callers cli app go admin api deps go admin api errors go webconsole api handlers go integration tests server tests preserved conversation identityref value type in types go used for message sender identity id no db dependency identitybcfacade wiring into messagewriter deferred to post fe-1 when auth context carries bc9 identity ids moving to be-9
messages.senderDescription: 全栈开发实现，包括单测

messages.content:
收到，BE-8 先保持 in_review。旧 Conversation identity 包和旧 admin identity endpoints 删除方向正确。

保留一个验收关注点：`IdentityBCFacade` 接入 MessageWriter 不能长期 deferred。FE-1/auth context ready 后，message sender_identity_id 必须来自 BC9 identity，且 Conversation BC 只能通过 facade 校验 identity 存在/active，不能重新拥有 identity schema。这个我会在 FE-1 / final acceptance 里挡。

继续 BE-9。
